records.ety: [F. carnage, LL. carnaticum tribute of animals, flesh of animals, fr. L. caro, carnis, flesh. See Carnal.]

defs: Flesh of slain animals or men.
quotes: A miltitude of dogs came to feast on the carnage.

defs: Great destruction of life, as in battle; bloodshed; slaughter; massacre; murder; havoc.
quotes: The more fearful carnage of the Bloody Circuit.
